title: coincya tournefortii
intro: Coincya tournefortii, also known as Tournefort's cabbage or rock cabbage, is a plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It is a perennial plant native to the Iberian Peninsula and the Mediterranean region, characterized by its edible leaves and purple flowers. Coincya tournefortii has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to have various health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or ointment, and is often used to treat conditions like arthritis, digestive issues, and skin problems.
